item.title: TP-Link USB 3.0 7-poorts hub UH700
item.description: You can find TP-Link USB 3.0 7-poorts hub UH700 with a discount here: ℹ️: Twee jaar garantie op fabrieksfouten Wifi TP-Link 🛒 Buy it!!
